visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit warehouse store, a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy grey and black patterned hat and a pink sweater, stands in front of stacks of produce. She holds a large clear plastic box filled with red cherry tomatoes, speaking directly to the camera with an expressive face and hand gestures. (2) Close-up shots alternate between her face and the box of tomatoes. She pulls a single tomato out to compare its size to her thumb, emphasizing its large scale against her hand. Background shows other shoppers and shelves. (3) The scene transitions to a brightly lit modern indoor living room. The woman is now wearing a black beret and a white top with ruffles. She holds the same box of tomatoes and continues her presentation with high energy. (4) A series of close-up shots show her at a table wearing transparent plastic gloves. She uses pink scissors to cut dark, dried fruit into small pieces, then uses a knife to carefully slit a large red cherry tomato along its side on a white cutting board. (5) She demonstrates stuffing the cut fruit into the tomato slit. The final phase shows a heart-shaped pink plate filled with the prepared stuffed tomatoes. She picks one up, eats it, and closes her eyes with a delighted expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好市多終於又進小番茄. (2) [Subtitle]: 而且它的番茄很棒. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為它超大 你看跟我大拇哥一樣. (4) [Variety]: 包密餞版. [Subtitle]: 就可以包密餞. (5) [Subtitle]: 夜市的密餞番茄不是很貴嗎 50塊一袋. (6) [Subtitle]: 那個密餞一大袋100 然後這個225. (7) [Subtitle]: 自己買密餞包 吃一整週. (8) [Variety]: 超值得. [Subtitle]: 超值得 他真的很大哎. (9) [Subtitle]: 我覺得品相很漂亮 終於進了 趕快買. (10) [Subtitle]: 好市多小番茄無痛升級 超好吃這一盒呢. (11) [Subtitle]: 225元他這一次進的番茄呢. (12) [Subtitle]: 是產銷履歷小番茄非常大 每一個都跟. (13) [Variety]: 大拇哥一樣. [Subtitle]: 大拇哥一樣. (14) [Subtitle]: 這種呢包蜜餞超讚. (15) [Subtitle]: 先把化應子剪小塊小塊的. (16) [Subtitle]: 胖胖小番茄中間切一條. (17) [Subtitle]: 接著再塞進去. (18) [Subtitle]: 自己包超簡單. (19) [Subtitle]: 耶 吃吃看. (20) [Subtitle]: 嗯好吃 好吃好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character, 3 distant shoppers in the store background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a pink knit sweater and a fuzzy hat in the first half, and a white ruffled top with a black beret in the second half.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse store with industrial shelving, produce boxes, and other shoppers, followed by a clean, modern home interior with a sofa and TV visible.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking rapidly in Mandarin, accompanied by a bright, upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 beat. Faint, distant echoes of a large indoor space are present. (2) The vocal continues with high arousal and positive valence, featuring varied intonation as she compares price points. (3) A subtle shift in the background noise occurs as the acoustic environment becomes more intimate and dry. (4) Distinct metallic 'snip' sounds of scissors and the dull 'clack' of a knife hitting a board punctuate the speech. (5) Short, stylized pop-up sound effects coincide with visual transitions. (6) Audibly moist chewing sounds and a soft vocal 'Mmm' signifying satisfaction are heard towards the end, while the music maintains its high energy until the final cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Feature Highlight -> Process Tutorial -> Tasting/Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote cherry tomatoes from Costco by highlighting their exceptional size and value, while providing a simple, appealing tutorial on how to prepare them as a popular snack (stuffed with dried plums). It leverages a high-energy, relatable vlog style to encourage viewers to purchase the product and try the recipe themselves.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the Costco logo, specific price mentions, and praise for the product's quality and value.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high speech density and rapid visual cuts are characteristic of short-form social media content optimized for high retention. The use of 'Variety' style subtitles adds a comedic and engaging layer.
